name: Electronics
description: A comprehensive category for all electronic devices and gadgets including consumer electronics, computers, mobile devices, and accessories. This category encompasses products ranging from smartphones and laptops to smart home devices and wearable technology.

name: Smartphones & Tablets
description: Mobile computing devices including smartphones, tablets, and related accessories. Features the latest models from major manufacturers with various operating systems and screen sizes suitable for personal and professional use.

name: Computers & Laptops
description: Desktop computers, laptops, and ultrabooks for personal, professional, and gaming purposes. Includes various processor types, RAM configurations, and storage options to meet diverse computing needs.

name: Clothing & Apparel
description: Men's, women's, and children's clothing including casual wear, formal attire, activewear, and seasonal clothing. Covers all sizes and styles from budget-friendly to premium brands.

name: Men's Clothing
description: Complete range of men's apparel including shirts, pants, jackets, and formal wear. Features contemporary styles and classic designs suitable for various occasions and preferences.

name: Women's Clothing
description: Diverse selection of women's fashion including dresses, tops, bottoms, outerwear, and accessories. Offers trendy and timeless pieces from casual to formal collections.

name: Home & Garden
description: Furniture, home décor, gardening tools, and outdoor equipment for improving living spaces. Includes items for bedroom, kitchen, living room, and garden maintenance.

name: Furniture
description: Indoor and outdoor furniture including sofas, tables, chairs, beds, and storage solutions. Offers various styles from minimalist to traditional designs to suit different interior preferences.

name: Sports & Outdoors
description: Athletic equipment, sports gear, camping supplies, and outdoor recreation products. Includes items for fitness, team sports, hiking, and various outdoor activities.

name: Fitness Equipment
description: Exercise machines, weights, yoga mats, resistance bands, and other fitness tools for home and gym use. Suitable for beginners to advanced fitness enthusiasts.

name: Books & Media
description: Physical and digital books, audiobooks, magazines, DVDs, and multimedia content. Covers fiction, non-fiction, educational materials, and entertainment across all genres.

name: Food & Beverages
description: Groceries, snacks, beverages, and specialty food items for everyday consumption. Includes organic products, international foods, and dietary-specific options for various nutritional needs.
